src: Fabio Capello has emerged as the new favourite to succeed Steve McClaren as the England football team's new head coach after José Mourinho ruled himself out of taking the job.
ref: Fabio Capello telah muncul sebagai kegemaran baru untuk memenangi Steve McClaren sebagai ketua jurulatih baru pasukan bola sepak England selepas Jose Mourinho menarik diri dari mengambil kerja tersebut.

src: The former Chelsea manager had been widely regarded as a favourite for the job but after he admitted yesterday that he is no longer interested in it, Capello became the new favourite.
ref: Bekas pengurus Chelsea itu secara meluas telah dianggap sebagai kegemaran untuk kerja tersebut tetapi setelah beliau menyatakan semalam tidak lagi berminat untuk itu, Capello menjadi pilihan terbaru.

src: The Italian, who has previously managed Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus and Roma, would regard the England job as the highlight of his career according to sources close to him and is ready to open talks.
ref: Warga Itali itu, yang mana sebelum ini pernah menguruskan Real Madrid, AC Milan, Juventus dan Roma, menurut sumber-sumber rapatnya, beliau menganggap tugas England ini sebagai kemuncak dalam kariernya dan bersedia membuka meja perundingan.

src: Other candidates for the job include fellow Italian Marcello Lippi, former Germany coach Jurgen Klinsmann and Aston Villa manager Martin O'Neill.
ref: Calon-calon lain untuk tugas ini adalah termasuk rakan Itali Marcello Lippi, bekas jurulatih German Jurge Klinsmann dan pengurus Aston Villa Martin O'Neill.

src: He said that $100 dollars per barrel was a "fair" price and remembered that when he assumed presidency of Venezuela in 1999, the price went up to about ten dollars.
ref: Dia pernah berkata bahawa $100 dolar bagi setiap tong adalah harga yang "berpatutan" dan masih mengingatinya apabila dia menjadi presiden Venezuela pada tahun 1999, harga setiap tong naik sebanyak sepuluh dolar.

src: The prices of raw oil approached $100 last week before settling down again.
ref: Harga bagi minyak mentah mencecah $100 minggu lepas sebelum ianya turun kembali.

src: Some observers think it is possible that the $100 barrier may be broken.
ref: Sesetengah pemerhati merasakan bahawa $100 halangan mungkin boleh dipecahkan.

src: During the trading session following this two-day summit, that is expected to result in the "Declaration of Riyadh", the price of petroleum rose $0.80 in the New York market and $0.66 in London.
ref: Semasa sesi dagangan di sidang kemuncak dua hari, yang dijangka akan menyebabkan "Pengisytiharan Riyadh," harga petroleum telah meningkat sebanyak $0.80 di pasaran New York dan $0.66 di pasaran London.

src: Three people were hospitalized with injuries after a series of explosions at Southwest Industrial Gases, Inc., a gas facility in Dallas, Texas.
ref: Tiga orang dimasukkan ke hospital kerana kecederaan selepas beberapa siri letupan di Southwest Gas Industri, Inc., kemudahan gas di Dallas, Texas.

src: Tanks of oxygen, helium and acetylene began to explode after a connector used to join acetylene tanks during the filling process malfunctioned.
ref: Tangki oksigen, helium dan asetilena mula meletup selepas satu penyambung digunakan untuk menyambung tangki asetilena semasa proses pengisian berfungsi.

src: The explosions sent flaming debris into the air and onto buildings and expressways.
ref: Letupan itu menyebabkan serpihan berapi terbang ke udara dan ke bangunan dan lebuh raya.

src: Black smoke that could be seen for miles billowed from the facility.
ref: Asap hitam yang berawan asap boleh dilihat untuk berbatu jauhnya dari kemudahan tersebut.

src: The problem began around 9:30 a.m CDT (UTC-5) at a loading dock, according to Dallas Fire Department Lt. Joel Lavender, and then spread to a trailer housing some 100,000 cubic feet (approximately 28,300 cubic metres) of gas.
ref: Masalah itu bermula sekitar 9:30 pagi CDT (UTC-5) pada dok angkutan, menurut Jabatan Bomba Dallas Lt. Joel Lavender, dan kemudian merebak ke perumahan treler kira-kira 100,000 kaki padu (lebih kurang 28,300 meter padu) gas.

src: Authorities evacuated an area that was one-half of a mile (approximately 800 m) wide.
ref: Pihak Berkuasa mengosongkan kawasan yang berlebar setengah batu (kira-kira 800 m).

src: Portions of Interstate 35 and Interstate 30 were shut down.
ref: Bahagian Interstate 35 dan Interstate 30 telah ditutup.

src: Flaming debris ignited small grass fires next to the roads.
ref: Serpihan berapi mennyalakan rumput dan menyebabkan kebakaran kecil yang bersebelahan dengan jalan raya.

src: Tanks were reported to have landed as far away as four blocks.
ref: Tangki dilaporkan telah mendarat sejauh empat lorong jauhnya.

src: Officials for the Environmental Protection Agency, as well as local and state environmental officials, have deemed air quality levels acceptable following the blast.
ref: Pegawai Agensi Perlindungan Alam Sekitar, sekali dengan pegawai-pegawai alam sekitar tempatan dan negeri, telah menganggap tahap kualiti udara boleh diterima berikutan letupan itu.

src: Hazardous material crews have blocked water used in the fire from entering the Dallas storm drains.
ref: Kru bahan berbahaya telah menghalang air yang digunakan di dalam kebakaran itu daripada mengalir ke longkang Dallas.

src: "I just advised my teams to get out," said Eddy Parker of Airgas which operates right next to Southwest Industrial.
ref: "Saya hanya menasihatkan pasukan saya supaya keluar," kata Eddy Parker daripada Airgas yang beroperasi di sebelah Barat Daya Industri.

src: "Then we turned and ran and just kept hearing explosions."
ref: "Kemudian kita berpusing dan lari dan terus mendengar suara letupan."

src: "Given the fact that there haven’t been any fatalities, it seems like our fire department and emergency responders did a great job."
ref: "Memandangkan hakikat bahawa tiada apa-apa kemalangan maut, nampaknya jabatan bomba dan tindak balas kecemasan kami melakukan kerja yang hebat."

src: "But we need to let the fire department look at why this is occurring there in that area," said City Councilman Steve Salazar.
ref: "Tetapi kita perlu membiarkan jabatan bomba siasat mengapa ini berlaku di kawasan itu," kata anggota majlis bandar Steve Salazar.

src: Two of the injured men, Randal Bibb, 52, and Daniel McMurry, 56, were taken to Parkland Memorial Hospital to be treated for upper-body burns.
ref: Dua daripada lelaki yang tercedera, Randal Bibb, 52, dan Daniel McMurry, 56, telah dibawa ke Hospital Memorial Parkland untuk merawat luka bakar bahagian atas badan.

src: The third, an unidentified truck-driver, was treated and released at Methodist Dallas Medical Center.
ref: Mangsa ketiga yang tidak dikenali, pemandu trak, dirawat dan keluar daripada Pusat Perubatan Methodist Dallas.

src: He hurt his back when he jumped from the cab of his truck.
ref: Dia cedera belakangnya apabila dia melompat dari bahagian angkutan lori itu.

src: The official results of the 2007 Ontario General Election now show that the Ontario Liberal Party has been re-elected.
ref: Keputusan rasmi Pilihan Raya Umum Ontario 2007 kini menunjukkan bahawa Parti Liberal Ontario telah dipilih semula.

src: The Liberal Party lead by Dalton McGuinty will spend the next four years in a majority government.
ref: Parti Liberal yang diketuai oleh Dalton McGuinty akan menghabiskan empat tahun akan datang sebagai kerajaan majoriti.

src: McGuinty is the first Liberal premier to have back-to-back majorities since Mitchell Hepburn, who held office from 1934-1942, with his second majority starting in 1937.
ref: McGuinty adalah perdana menteri Liberal yang pertama untuk mempunyai majoriti berturutan sejak Mitchell Hepburn, yang memegang jawatan daripada 1934-1942, dengan majoriti keduanya bermula pada tahun 1937.

src: Hepburn's government legacy includes the Queen Elizabeth Way and Rainbow Bridge to Niagara Falls, New York.
ref: Legasi kerajaan Hepburn merangkumi Queen Elizabeth Way dan Jambatan Rainbow ke Air Terjun Niagara, New York.

src: Pope Shenouda III of Alexandria, the leader of Egypt's Coptic Christian church, has died at the age of 88.
ref: Paus Shenouda III dari Alexandria, pemimpin Gereja Kristian Koptik Mesir, meninggal pada usia 88 tahun.

src: His funeral was held at a packed in Cairo today.
ref: Majlis pengkebumian beliau dijalankan di Kairo hari ini.

src: The mass featured hymns, prayers and incense-burning as crowds in and outside the cathedral paid their respects.
ref: Upacara gereja tersebut memaparkan gita puja, talkin dan pembakaran kemenyan sambil orang ramai di dalam dan luar gereja memberi penghormatan.

src: A large police presence watched over the scenes as mourners wept.
ref: Pihak polis berkumpul untuk mengawasi peristiwa tersebut sementara orang yang berkabung meratap pemergian beliau.

src: Field Marshal , presently leader of Egypt, has made today a day of mourning.
ref: Fil Marsyal, yang merupakan pemimpin Mesir pada ketika ini, telah menjadikan hari ini sebagai hari berkabung.

src: The Coptic Church is among the world's oldest and traces its roots to St Mark in the first century.
ref: Gereja Koptik merupakan antara gereja yang tertua dan mempunyai kesan jejak St. Mark pada abad pertama.

src: Shenouda spent 40 years as pope to the Coptics, who make up the majority of the nation's estimated ten million Christians.
ref: Shenouda menghabiskan 40 tahun sebagai paus Koptik, yang membentuk majoriti negara sehingga mencapai anggaran sepuluh juta penganut Kristian.

src: Much of this time was spent pacifying his followers in the wake of violence and perceived discrimination, whilst working with the majority Muslims.
ref: Kebanyakan masa diluangkan untuk menenangkan pengikutnya berikutan keganasan dan sikap diskriminasi, semasa bekerja dengan majoriti Muslim.

src: He spent three years exiled in the cathedral after claims of sectarian troublemaking from then-President in 1981.
ref: Beliau menghabiskan tiga tahun mengecilkan diri di dalam gereja selepas tuduhan masalah sektaris oleh Presiden ketika itu pada tahun 1981.

src: With Mubarak gone, many Copts are concerned that Islamist political parties gaining new influence could mark a time of trouble for their religion.
ref: Dengan ketiadaan Mubarak, ramai golongan Kopt prihatin terhadap parti politik Islam dalam memperoleh pengaruh baru yang boleh membawa masalah kepada agama mereka.

src: "He left us an example of leadership that we should all follow," a cleric told the congregation at the fourth-century cathedral.
ref: "Beliau meninggalkan kita semua satu contoh kepimpinan yang kita semua harus ikuti," seorang paderi memberitahu jemaah pada abad keempat gereja.

src: "It is because of him that we have national unity with our Muslim brothers".
ref: "Kerana beliaulah kita memperoleh kesatuan dengan saudara Muslim."

src: Traffic was congested around the cathedral, which the pope remained fond of, while services were ongoing today.
ref: Trafik sesak di sekeliling gereja, tempat yang digemari paus, manakala perkhidmatan masih dijalankan sehingga kini.

src: Shenouda was dressed in full regalia, complete with a gold crown.
ref: Shenouda dipakaikan pakaian lengkap yang disempurnakan dengan mahkota emas.

src: His body was taken to a military airfield and was to be taken to desert monastery St Bishoy for burial.
ref: Jasadnya telah dibawa lapangan terbang tentera dan diwa ke padang pasir biara St Bishoy untuk pengebumian.

src: Tributes have been paid to Pope Shenouda as thousands of people mourned his death.
ref: Penghormatan telah diberikan kepada Paus Shenouda demikian beribu orang berkabung atas kematian beliau.

src: President of the United States Barack Obama said in a statement "We will remember Pope Shenouda III as a man of deep faith, a leader of a great faith, and an advocate for unity and reconciliation…"
ref: Presiden Amerika Syarikat Barack Obama berkata dalam satu kenyataan "Kita akan memperingati Paus Shenouda III sebagai seorang lelaki yang penuh setia, pemimpin yang sangat beriman, dan pembela kesatuan dan kedamaian..."

src: "His commitment to Egypt's national unity is also a testament to what can be accomplished when people of all religions and creeds work together."
ref: "Komitmen beliau dalam kesatuan Mesir merupakan bukti yang boleh diperoleh apabila semua orang dari pelbagai agama dan kepercayaan bekerjasama."

src: American author and producer Michael Crichton has died in Los Angeles, California at the age of 66, according to a statement released by his family.
ref: Pengarang dan pengeluar buku Amerika, Michael Crichton telah meninggal dunia di Los Angeles, California pada usia 66 tahun, menurut satu kenyataan yang dikeluarkan oleh keluarganya.

src: According to Entertainment Tonight, Crichton died after a long and quiet battle with cancer.
ref: Menurut Entertainment Tonight, Crichton meninggal dunia selepas perlawanan yang lama dan senyap dengan kanser.

src: While the world knew him as a great storyteller that challenged our preconceived notions about the world around us — and entertained us all while doing so — his wife Sherri, daughter Taylor, family and friends knew Michael Crichton as a devoted husband, loving father and generous friend who inspired each of us to strive to see the wonders of our world through new eyes, said a statement by his family.
ref: Walaupun dunia mengenalinya sebagai penglipur lara hebat yang telah mencabar tanggapan awal kita tentang dunia di sekeliling kita - dan menghiburkan kita semua dengan berbuat begitu - isterinya Sherri, anak perempuannya Taylor, keluarga serta rakan-rakannya mengenali Michael Crichton sebagai suami berdedikasi, bapa penyayang dan rakan pemurah yang mengilhamkan setiap daripada kita untuk terus berusaha bagi melihat keajaiban dunia kita melalui pandangan yang baru, kata sebuah keterangan oleh keluarganya.

src: Crichton, who was born in Chicago, Illinois in 1942, was most famous for the writing of his Jurassic Park novels.
ref: Crichton, yang dilahirkan di Chicago, Illinois pada tahun 1942, paling terkenal dengan penulisan novel Jurassic Park beliau.

src: He also published The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline, Eaters of the Dead, all of which became major motion pictures.
ref: Beliau juga menerbitkan The Andromeda Strain, Congo, Rising Sun, Timeline dan Eaters of the Death yang semuanya menjadi filem utama.

src: He also created, and was an active executive producer of the hit television show ER.
ref: Beliau juga mencipta dan merupakan seorang penerbit eksekutif aktif rancangan televisyen terkenal ER.

src: BP released their report into the causes of the Deepwater Horizon disaster earlier this year on Wednesday, and shifted much of the blame for the explosion and subsequent oil spill in the Gulf of Mexico, the largest accidental marine oil spill in the history of the petroleum industry, onto , the company managing the rig.
ref: BP telah mengeluarkan laporan mengenai sebab bencana Deepwater Horizon awal tahun ini pada hari Rabu, dan meletakkan hampir semua kesalahan untuk letupan dan kemudiannya tumpahan minyak di dalam Teluk Mexico, tumpahan minyak di marin secara tidak sengaja terbesar di dalam sejarah industri petroleum, kepada, syarikat yang menguruskan rig.

src: The report concludes by stating that decisions made by "multiple companies and work teams" contributed to the accident which it says arose from "a complex and interlinked series of mechanical failures, human judgments, engineering design, operational implementation and team interfaces."
ref: Laporan itu merumuskan dengan menyatakan keputusan itu dibuat oleh "banyak syarikat dan pasukan kerja" yang terlibat dalam kemalangan tersebut di mana ia menyatakan timbul dari "kegagalan siri mekanikal yang rumit dan bersambung, pertimbangan manusia, reka bentuk kejuruteraan, pelaksanaan operasi dan antara muka pasukan."

src: The report, the product of a four-month investigation conducted by BP's Head of Safety Operations, Mark Bly, criticizes the oil rig's fire prevention systems, the crew of the rig for failing to realize and act upon evidence that oil was leaking from the surface of the ocean, and describes how BP and Transocean "incorrectly accepted" negative pressure test results.
ref: Laporan itu, hasil dari empat-bulan penyiasatan oleh Ketua Keselamatan Operasi BP, Mark Bly, mengkritik sistem pencegahan kebakaran rig minyak, krew rig kerana gagal menyedari dan bertindak apabila ada bukti minyak sedang bocor dari permukaan laut, dan menggambarkan bagaimana BP dan Transocean "tersalah menerima" keputusan ujian tekanan negatif.

src: The document goes on to note that the blow-out preventer failed to operate, likely because critical components were not operational.
ref: Dokumen itu terus mencatatkan bahawa alat pencegah semburan gagal berfungsi, berkemungkinan disebabkan komponen kritikal yang tidak boleh berfungsi.

src: Bob Dudley, who will become chief executive of BP, described the accident as "tragic".
ref: Bob Dudley, yang akan menjadi Ketua Eksekutif BP, menggambarkan kemalangan itu sebagai suatu "tragedi."

src: He said, "we have said from the beginning that the explosion on the Deepwater Horizon was a shared responsibility among many entities."
ref: Beliau berkata, "Kami sudah katakan dari awal bahawa letupan di Deepwater Horizon adalah tanggungjawab bersama banyak entiti."

src: "This report makes that conclusion even clearer, presenting a detailed analysis of the facts and recommendations for improvement both for BP and the other parties involved."
ref: "Laporan ini menjelaskan lagi kesimpulan itu, dengan mengemukakan analisis fakta yang terperinci dan cadangan untuk pembaikan bagi kedua-dua BP dan pihak lain yang terlibat."

src: "We have accepted all the recommendations and are examining how best to implement them across our drilling operations worldwide."
ref: "Kami telah menerima semua cadangan tersebut dan sedang meneliti cara terbaik bagi melaksanakannya di dalam operasi penggerudian kami di seluruh dunia."

src: The report included 25 recommendations, according to a press release, "designed to prevent a recurrence of such an accident."
ref: Laporan tersebut turut mengandungi 25 cadangan, yang menurut siaran akhbar, "direka untuk mencegah kemalangan sebegitu dari berulang semula."

src: The oil company has previously blamed Transocean and Halliburton, the well contractor, for the disaster and BP executives feel they have been unfairly blamed by US politicians for the disaster, and the report continues this view.
ref: Syarikat minyak itu sebelumnya menyalahkan Transocean dan Halliburton, kontraktor telaga, untuk bencana itu dan eksekutif BP merasa mereka telah disalahkan dengan tidak adil oleh ahli politik US ke atas bencana itu, dan laporan itu meneruskan pandangan ini.

src: Tony Hayward, who was fired from the position of BP's chief executive following multiple public relations issues, squarely places the blame for the disaster on Halliburton.
ref: Tony Hayward, yang telah dipecat dari jawatan ketua eksekutif BP berikutan dari beberapa isu perhubungan awam, secara jujurnya meletakkan tanggungjawab ke atas bencana itu kepada Halliburton.

src: "To put it simply, there was a bad cement job," he said in a statement, also claiming that BP should not be the only company to take the blame for the explosion.
ref: "Secara mudahnya, ada kerja simen yang tidak dilakukan dengan baik," dia berkata di dalam satu kenyataan, dia juga mendakwa BP tidak patut menjadi satu-satunya syarikat yang dipersalahkan ke atas letupan itu.

src: "It would appear unlikely that the well design contributed to the incident," he argues.
ref: "Kemungkinan besar reka bentuk telaga itu yang menyumbang kepada kemalangan tersebut," dia berhujah.

src: The report blames the type of cement used by Halliburton, designed to prevent harmful hydrocarbons from reaching the seabed, as well as criticizing the crew of Deepwater Horizon, for failing to realize for forty minutes that oil had started to leak from the well, and once it was realized, the crew "vented" the hydrocarbons "directly onto the rig".
ref: Laporan itu menyalahkan jenis simen yang telah digunakan oleh Halliburton, direka bentuk untuk menghalang hidrokarbon yang berbahaya dari sampai ke dasar laut, dan juga mengkritik krew Deepwater Horizon, kerana gagal menyedari selama empat puluh minit yang minyak sudah mula bocor dari telaga, dan setelah disedari, krew telah "melepaskan" hidrokarbon "tepat ke rig."

src: Describing how the explosion, which killed eleven rig personnel, occurred, the report states that "the heating, ventilation and air conditioning system probably transferred a gas-rich mixture into the engine rooms," where the hydrocarbons ignited and a fireball engulfed the rig.
ref: Menggambarkan bagaimana letupan, yang telah membunuh sebelas kakitangan rig berlaku, laporan menyatakan bahawa "pemanasan, pengudaraan dan sistem penyaman udara mungkin memindahkan campuran tinggi dengan gas ke dalam bilik enjin," di mana hidrokarbon dinyalakan dan bola api menelan rig tersebut.

src: But, the report states, the blowout preventer, the ultimate failsafe on the Deepwater Horizon failed, likely due to the fire on the rig.
ref: Bagaimanapun, laporan menyatakan, pencegah semburan, sistem pasti selamat terakhir di Deepwater Horizon gagal, kemungkinan disebabkan api di rig.

src: An automated system was not operational because the batteries powering it, located in a control pod, had gone flat, and another control pod contained a faulty solenoid valve.
ref: Satu sistem berautomat tidak dapat berfungsi kerana ia menggunakan kuasa bateri, diletakkan di pod kawalan, sudah mati, dan pod kawalan yang lain pula mempunyai injap solenoid yang rosak.

src: The report was likely, however, written with the company's legal liability for the disaster in a prominent position, since they are facing hundreds of lawsuits and criminal charges as a result of the spill.
ref: Laporan itu, bagaimanapun, kemungkinan ditulis dengan liabiliti undang-undang syarikat untuk bencana itu di kedudukan utama, memandangkan mereka sedang menghadapi ratusan tuntutan mahkamah dan tuduhan jenayah akibat daripada tumpahan itu.

src: The executive summary is four and a half pages long and the first page is made up entirely of legal disclaimers saying if BP was found to be negligent in their operations of the rig, they could be fined a good deal more.
ref: Ringkasan eksekutif itu sebanyak empat dan separuh muka surat panjang dan di muka surat pertama tertulis penafian undang-undang semata-mata yang mengatakan jika BP ditemui cuai di dalam operasi rig mereka, mereka boleh disaman dengan lebih banyak lagi.

src: Questions have also been raised as to why BP has chosen to release their report before authorities examine the blowout preventer.
ref: Persoalan juga timbul tentang mengapa BP telah memilih untuk mengeluarkan laporan mereka sebelum pihak berkuasa memeriksa pencegah semburan.

src: The energy editor of The Guardian, Terry Macalister, wrote that the "catalogue of errors - both human and mechanical" in the report "demolish" the oil industry's "much quoted mantra" of safety first.
ref: Editor tenaga The Guardian, Terry Macalister, menulis bahawa "katalog ralat-ralat - dari manusia dan mekanikal" di dalam laporan tersebut "memusnahkan" "mantera yang sering dipetik" oleh industri minyak tentang keselamatan diutamakan.

src: "It may come first in the board room but it does not down at the wellhead where the real dangers are faced," he wrote.
ref: "Ia mungkin menjadi keutamaan di dalam bilik lembaga tetapi tidak di kepala telaga di mana bahaya sebenar sedang dihadapi," dia menulis.

src: "It is worth remembering that BP, its rig operator Transocean and the main well contractor Halliburton are the blue chip companies in the wider oil and gas sector."
ref: "Adalah berbaloi untuk diingati bahawa BP, operator rignya Transocean dan kontraktor telaga utama Halliburton adalah syarikat cip biru di dalam sektor minyak dan gas yang lebih luas."

src: "If the shoddy work practices highlighted here are what the best-in-class do, then what is happening in the lower reaches of this industry?"
ref: "Jika amalan kerja tidak bermutu yang ditekankan di sini adalah apa yang sedang dilakukan syarikat kelas terbaik, jadi apakah yang sedang berlaku di dalam kelas bawah industri ini?"

src: Transocean described the report as a "self-serving" attempt to "conceal the critical factor that set the stage for the Macondo incident: BP's fatally flawed well design."
ref: Transocean menggambarkan laporan tersebut sebagai cubaan "swadiri" untuk "menyembunyikan faktor kritikal yang menyediakan pentas kepada kejadian Macondo: BP telah memusnahkan reka bentuk telaga sehingga membawa maut."

src: "In both its design and construction, BP made a series of cost-saving decisions that increased risk - in some cases, severely."
ref: "Dalam kedua-dua reka bentuk dan binaannya, BP telah membuat beberapa siri keputusan untuk menjimatkan kos yang menambah risiko - dalam sesetengah kes, dengan teruk."

src: In a statement, the company listed five issues they felt had contributed to the disaster that were no fault but BP's.
ref: Di dalam satu kenyataan, syarikat tersebut menyenaraikan lima isu yang mereka fikir menyumbang kepada bencana itu yang kesalahannya terletak hanya pada BP.

src: "Transocean's investigation is ongoing, and will be concluded when all of the evidence is in, including the critical information the company has requested of BP but has yet to receive."
ref: "Penyiasatan Transocean sedang dilaksanakan, dan akan disimpulkan apabila semua bukti telah ada, termasuklah maklumat kritikal yang syarikat tersebut telah meminta daripada BP tetapi masih belum menerimanya."

src: Members of Congress, who are also carrying out a review into the disaster, also dismissed the report.
ref: Ahli-ahli Kongres, yang turut mengeluarkan ulasan tentang bencana ini, juga menolak laporan tersebut.

src: Ed Markey, the Massachusetts democrat who has been investigating the spill in Congress, said that he felt the report was simply a lengthy defense of the oil company's handling of the spill.
ref: Ed Markey, demokrat Massachusetts yang sedang menyiasat tumpahan ini di Kongres, berkata yang beliau merasakan laporan ini hanyalah satu pertahanan yang panjang dari syarikat yang menguruskan tumpahan itu.

src: "BP is happy to slice up blame, as long as they get the smallest piece," he said.
ref: "BP dengan gembira mahu membahagikan kesalahan, asalkan mereka mendapat bahagian yang terkecil," katanya.

src: Bly acknowledged during a press conference in Washington that the report did not detail the charges raised against the company in Congress and that BP permitted a culture of recklessness to flourish.
ref: Bly mengakui semasa persidangan akhbar di Washington bahawa laporan itu tidak memperincikan tuduhan-tuduhan yang dihadapi syarikat itu di Kongres dan BP membenarkan budaya kecuaian berkembang.

src: He did, however, reject suggestions that cost-cutting had put lives at risk and the rig was a disaster waiting to happen.
ref: Beliau, bagaimanapun, menolak dakwaan bahawa pemotongan kos telah meletakkan banyak nyawa di dalam bahaya dan rig tersebut adalah bencana yang menunggu untuk berlaku.

src: "What we see instead is, where there were errors made they were based on poor decision-making process or using wrong information," he said.
ref: "Apa yang kami nampak adalah, ada ralat yang dibuat dan itu adalah disebabkan proses membuat keputusan yang lemah atau menggunakan maklumat yang salah," kata beliau.

src: The Guardian reported that "the report is narrowly focused on the final days before the explosion rather than on earlier decisions about well design and safety procedures."
ref: The Guardian melaporkan bahawa "laporan itu terlalu memfokuskan kepada hari-hari terakhir sebelum letupan berbanding keputusan-keputusan awal berkaitan reka bentuk telaga dan prosedur keselamatan."

src: "No BP officials have been sacked for their role in the explosion, and Bly said there was no indication of any blame beyond the well-site managers."
ref: "Tiada seorang pun pengawai BP yang dipecat kerana peranan mereka di dalam letupan itu, dan Bly berkata tidak ada tanda-tanda untuk menyalahkan sesiapa yang atas dari pengurus tapak-telaga."

src: The Associated Press reported that Bly "said at a briefing in Washington that the internal report was a reconstruction of what happened on the rig based on the company's data and interviews with mostly BP employees and was not meant to focus on assigning blame."
ref: The Associated Press melaporkan bahawa Bly "berkata di dalam satu taklimat di Washington yang laporan dalaman adalah penyusunan semula apa yang terjadi di rig berpandukan data syarikat dan temubual yang kebanyakannya dengan pekerja BP dan bukan memfokuskan untuk mengagihkan kesalahan."

src: "The six-person investigating panel only had access to a few workers from other companies, and samples of the actual cement used in the well were not released."
ref: "Enam-orang panel penyiasatan hanya mempunyai akses ke beberapa pekerja dari syarikat lain, dan sampel simen sebenar yang digunakan di telaga tidak dikeluarkan."

src: The report continued, "Steve Yerrid, special counsel on the oil spill for Florida Gov. Charlie Crist, said the report clearly shows the company is attempting to spread blame for the well disaster, foreshadowing what will be a likely legal effort to force Halliburton and Transocean, and perhaps others, to share costs such as paying claims and government penalties."
ref: Laporan itu menyambung, "Steve Yarrid, peguam khas untuk tumpahan minyak kepada Florida Gov. Charlie Crist, berkata laporan itu dengan jelasnya menunjukkan yang syarikat itu sedang cuba untuk membahagikan kesalahan bencana telaga, membayangi apa yang mungkin sekali usaha undang-undang bagi memaksa Halliburton dan Transocean, dan mungkin yang lain, untuk berkongsi kos-kos seperti membayar tuntutan dan penalti dari kerajaan."

src: Head of Greenpeace's energy campaign Jim Footner said that it was "highly likely that a truly independent report would be even more damning for BP."
ref: Ketua kempen tenaga Greenpeace Jim Footner berkata bahawa "besar kemungkinan satu laporan yang betul-betul peribadi akan lebih menjahanamkan BP."

src: However, he said, "the real problem is our addiction to oil, which is pushing companies like BP to put lives and the environment at risk."
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, kata beliau, "masalah yang sebenar ialah ketagihan kita terhadap minyak, yang memaksa syarikat-syarikat seperti BP meletakkan nyawa dan alam sekitar di dalam risiko."

src: "The age of oil is coming to an end and companies like BP will be left behind unless they begin to adapt now."
ref: "Zaman minyak semakin hampir sampai ke penghujung dan syarikat-syarikat seperti BP akan ketinggalan melainkan mereka mula menyesuaikan diri dari sekarang."

src: "The time has come to move beyond oil and invest in clean energy."
ref: "Masanya telah tiba untuk beralih ke tenaga selain minyak dan melabur dalam tenaga bersih."

src: Alfred R Sunsen, whose oyster company operating in the Gulf of Mexico is facing the prospect of going out of business after 134 years, reacted angrily the the report.
ref: Alfred R Sunsen, yang mengusahakan syarikat tiram di Teluk Mexico dan sedang menghadapi kemungkinan bankrap selepas 134 tahun, marah dengan laporan itu.

src: "The report does not address the people, businesses, animals, or natural resources that have been impacted by the disaster and will be dealing with the consequences of their inadequate and slow response to the disaster," he said.
ref: "Laporan itu tidak menumpukan perhatian kepada orang ramai, perniagaan-perniagaan, binatang-binatang, atau sumber asli yang telah terimpak dari bencana itu dan mereka yang akan menghadapi akibat dari respon mereka yang lambat dan tidak mencukupi dalam menghadapi bencana itu," katanya.

src: The New York Times said that the report is "unlikely to carry much weight in influencing the Department of Justice, which is considering criminal and civil charges related to the spill," and described it as "a public relations exercise" and a "probable legal strategy as it prepares to defend itself against possible federal charges, penalties and hundreds of pending lawsuits."
ref: The New York Times berkata laporan itu "tidak mungkin akan memberi kesan dalam mempengaruhi Jabatan Keadilan, yang sedang mempertimbangkan tuduhan jenayah dan awam kepada yang berkenaan dengan tumpahan itu," dan menggambarkan ia sebagai "satu bidang kuasa perhubungan awam" dan "mungkin satu strategi undang-undang kerana mereka sedang bersedia untuk mempertahankan diri dari tuduhan persekutuan yang mungkin ada, penalti-penalti dan ratusan tuntutan mahkamah yang masih belum selesai."

src: Wayne Pennington, head of the geological engineering department at Michigan Technical University, also alleged that BP was wrong to blame other parties involved with the disaster.
ref: Wayne Pennington, ketua jabatan kejuruteraan geologi di Universiti Teknikal Michigan, turut mendakwa BP adalah bersalah kerana menyalahkan pihak lain yang terlibat dengan bencana itu.

src: "The blowout and subsequent explosion and spillage appear to the result of an overall attitude that encouraged unwarranted optimism in the quality of each component of the job, allowing the omission of standard testing procedures, and the misinterpretation of other tests in the most-favorable light."
ref: "Semburan dan letupan susulan dan tumpahan itu adalah akibat dari sikap keseluruhan yang menggalakkan sikap optimis yang tidak wajar di dalam kualiti setiap komponen kerja, seterusnya membenarkan pengabaian prosedur pengujian standard, dan salah tafsir ke atas ujian lain di dalam keadaan yang difikirkan terbaik."

src: He continued: "Instead, skepticism should reign on any drilling job, and testing and evaluation at each stage of the drilling and completion would then be routine; instead of questioning the need for such things as the cement bond log, the companies involved should insist on checking and double-checking quality at each step of the process."
ref: Beliau menambah: "Tetapi seharusnya, sikap meragui perlu meliputi sebarang kerja penggerudian, dari itu ujian dan penilaian di setiap tahap penggerudian dan penyempurnaan akan menjadi satu rutin; daripada menyoal keperluan untuk setiap perkara seperti log susunan simen, syarikat-syarikat yang terlibat perlu menegaskan semakan dan semakan kali kedua bagi kualiti di setiap langkah proses."

src: "This was clearly not done, repeatedly, in the case of the Macondo well, and disaster resulted."
ref: "Ini amat jelas tidak dilaksanakan, berulang kali, di dalam kes telaga Macando, dan kesannya adalah satu bencana."

src: 4.9 million barrels of crude oil leaked into the Gulf of Mexico, causing damage to marine and wildlife habitats as well as the Gulf's fishing and tourism industries.
ref: 4.9 juta tong minyak mentah bocor ke dalam Teluk Mexico, menyebabkan kerosakan marin dan habitat hidupan liar dan juga kepada industri perikanan dan pelancongan Teluk.

src: Extensive measures were used to prevent the oil from reaching the coastline of Louisiana, including skimmer ships, floating containment booms, anchored barriers, and sand-filled barricades.
ref: Langkah secara besar-besaran telah diambil bagi menghalang minyak dari sampai ke garis pantai Louisiana, termasuk kapal penyiring, bum pembendungan terapung, pengadang bersauh, dan sekatan berisi pasir.

src: Scientists have also reported immense underwater plumes of dissolved oil not visible at the surface.
ref: Ahli saintis turut melaporkan kepulan larutan minyak yang amat besar di dalam air yang tidak dapat dilihat di permukaan.

src: The U.S. Government has named BP as the responsible party, and officials have committed to holding the company accountable for all cleanup costs and other damage.
ref: Kerajaan U.S. telah menamakan BP sebagai pihak yang bertanggungjawab, dan pihak berkuasa komited untuk mengikat syarikat itu supaya menanggung semua kos pembersihan dan kerosakan lain.

src: Dudley went on to say that BP "deeply regret" the disaster.
ref: Dudley berkata BP "amat kesal" terhadap bencana itu.

src: "We have sought throughout to step up to our responsibilities."
ref: "Kami telah diminta semua pihak untuk bangun menerima tanggungjawab kami."

src: "We are determined to learn the lessons for the future and we will be undertaking a broad-scale review to further improve the safety of our operations."
ref: "Kami berazam mahu belajar dari kesilapan demi masa hadapan dan akan mengambil ulasan berskala luas bagi meningkatkan lagi keselamatan di dalam operasi kami."

src: "It will be incumbent on everyone at BP to embrace and implement the changes necessary to ensure that a tragedy like this can never happen again."
ref: "Semua orang di BP wajib untuk menerima dan melaksanakan sebarang perubahan yang perlu bagi memastikan tragedi seperti ini tidak berulang semula."

src: A trio of Canadian trekkers said Friday they completed the fastest unaided on-foot trek using the traditional route from Hercules Inlet on the Ronne Ice Shelf to the South Pole in a record time of 33 days, 23 hours and 30 minutes.
ref: Pengembara Kanada kumpulan tiga orang berkata pada hari Jumaat bahawa mereka telah menamatkan perjalanan tanpa bantuan dengan berjalan kaki menggunakan laluan tradisional dari Hercules Inlet di Ronne Ice Shelf ke Kutub Selatan dalam rekod masa 33 hari, 23 jam dan 30 minit.

src: Ottawa ultra-runner Ray Zahab, age 39, adventure journalist and architect Kevin Vallely, age 44, of Lynn Valley, North Vancouver and North Pole expeditionist Richard Weber, age 49, said they completed the 700-mile (1,130-kilometer) journey, at 10,000 feet altitude, finally arriving early Wednesday morning.
ref: Pelari-Ultra Otawa, Ray Zahab, umur 39, wartawan pengembaraan dan arkitek Kevin Vallely, umur 44, Lynn Valley, Ahli ekspedisi utara Vancouver dan Kutub utara Richard Weber, umur 49, berkata bahawa mereka telah menamatkan perjalanan sepanjang 700 batu (1,130 kilometer), pada ketinggian 10,000 kaki, akhirnya tiba pada awal pagi Rabu.

src: They endured a white-out but survived on a 7,000-calorie-a-day diet of pemmican, Gatorade drink powder, outdated salami, deep-fried bacon, cheese and butter.
ref: Mereka mengharungi white-out, kerosakan mata akibat terdedah pada cahaya terang secara tiba-tiba tetapi terselamat dengan diet sebanyak 7,000 kalori sehari seperti pemmican, serbuk minuman Gatorade, salami luput tarikh, daging goreng, keju dan mentega.

src: "If you took a cloud, wrapped it around your head and then duct-taped it, that's what a white-out is like," Mr Zahab, explained.
ref: "Jika kamu mengambil awan, balutnya di sekeliling kepala kamu dan kemudian lekatkannya, itulah yang dimaksudkan dengan white-out," Encik Zahab, menjelaskan.

src: The trio also suffered altitude sickness, vertigo, massive, painful blisters, and temperatures as low as minus 40.
ref: Ketiga-tiga orang itu juga mengalami penyakit ketinggian, gayat, lepuh yang menyakitkan, dan besar dan suhu serendah negatif 40.

src: Zahab had to pull 170-lb (77-kg) sleds of equipment, traveling on foot and on snowshoes while the other two men skied.
ref: Zahab terpaksa menarik kereta lucur dengan peralatan seberat 170-lb (77 kg), dan berjalan kaki dengan kasut salji sementara dua lelaki lain berski.

src: According to ExplorersWeb.com's founder, Tom Sjogren, the trio erased the previous record of 39 days, 7 hours and 49 minutes, which was set by American Todd Carmichael, the first American to cross Antarctica to the South Pole alone, on foot and with no assistance.
ref: Menurut pengasas ExplorersWeb.com, Tom Sjogren, kumpulan tiga orang itu memecahkan rekod sebelumnya sepanjang 39 hari, 7 jam dan 49 minit, yang dipegang oleh warganergara Amerika Todd Carmichael, lelaki Amerika pertama yang menyeberangi Antartika ke Kutub Selatan, dengan berjalan kaki dan tiada bantuan.

src: Guinness World Records spokesman, Damian Field, in London, however, said that "Guinness monitors a category for fastest unsupported trek to the South Pole, but it has no record currently listed."
ref: Jurucakap Guinness World Records, Damian Field, bagaimanapun, berkata di London bahawa "Guinness memantau kategori untuk perjalanan terpantas tanpa bantuan ke Kutub Selatan tetapi ia tidak mempunyai rekod yang tersenarai kini."

src: Prior to Carmichael, the record was held by Briton Hannah McKeand.
ref: Sebelum Carmichael, rekod itu dipegang oleh Hannah McKeand dari Britain.

src: In the fastest journey to the South Pole (600 nautical mile journey), she completed solo and in just 39 days, 9 hours and 33 minutes.
ref: Dalam perjalanan yang paling cepat ke Kutub Selatan (600 perjalanan batu nautika), dia menghabiskan perjalanan seorang dan mencatatkan masa 39 hari, 9 jam dan 33 minit.

src: In March 2008 she attempted to reach the North Pole alone and unsupported but had to abandon the trip after falling through the ice and badly damaging her shoulder.
ref: Pada bulan Mac 2008, dia cuba mengembara ke Kutub Utara seorangan dan tanpa bantuan, tetapi terpaksa membatalkan lawatan itu selepas jatuh dari ais dan bahunya cedera teruk.

src: Ray Zahab is a Canadian ultramarathon runner, personal trainer, and motivational speaker.
ref: Ray Zahab adalah seorang pelari marathon-ultra Kanada, pelatih peribadi, dan penceramah motivasi.

src: He lives in Chelsea, Quebec, and is famous for his 4,300-mile (6,920-kilometer) epic run across the Sahara Desert in 2007, which was the subject of a documentary narrated by actor Matt Damon's "Running the Sahara."
ref: Dia tinggal di Chelsea, Quebec, dan terkenal dengan larian epik merentasi Gurun Sahara sepanjang 4,300 batu (6920 kilometer) pada tahun 2007, yang merupakan subjek dokumentari yang dikisahkan oleh pelakon Matt Damon "Running the Sahara."

src: He heads Impossible2Possible, a nonprofit organization which advocates planet protection.
ref: Beliau mengetuai Impossible2Possible, sebuah pertubuhan amal yang menggalakkan perlindungan planet.

src: "I started looking at impossible places on the planet in the past year, and I said Antarctica is one of those impossible places, and if we can create an expedition, perhaps we can inspire a bunch of young people to realize they can achieve," Zahab said.
ref: "Saya mula melihat tempat-tempat yang mustahil di dunia ini pada tahun lepas, dan saya berkata Antartika adalah salah satu tempat yang mustahil, dan jika kita boleh mewujudkan satu ekspedisi, mungkin kita boleh memberi inspirasi kepada anak-anak muda untuk menyedari bahawa mereka boleh berjaya," Zahab katanya.

src: Richard Weber, M.S.M. (born June 9, 1959 in Edmonton, Alberta) is a world-renowned Canadian Arctic and polar adventurer, from Alcove (near Wakefield).
ref: Richard Weber, M.S.M. (lahir 9 Jun 1959 di Edmonton, Alberta) adalah pengembara Artik dan kutub dari Kanada yang terkenal di dunia, berasal dari Alcove (berhampiran Wakefield).

src: From 1978 to 2006, he participated in, lead and organized more than 45 Arctic expeditions.
ref: Dari tahun 1978 hingga 2006, dia mengambil bahagian, mengetuai dan menganjurkan lebih daripada 45 ekspedisi ke Artik.

src: Richard is the only person to have completed six full North Pole expeditions.
ref: Richard ialah satu-satunya orang yang telah menamatkan enam ekspedisi penuh ke Kutub Utara.

src: He has therefore trekked to the North Pole more than anyone in history.
ref: Oleh itu, dia telah merentas masuk ke Kutub Utara lebih daripada orang lain dalam sejarah.

src: The trio were waiting out a storm before boarding a flight to Chile for Ottawa.
ref: Ketiga-tiga mereka sedang menunggu ribut reda sebelum menaiki penerbangan ke Chile dari Ottawa.

src: "I'm pretty tired, actually," said Kevin Vallely, calling from Patriot Hills, Antarctica.
ref: "Saya sebenarnya agak letih," kata Kevin Vallely, menelefon dari Patriot Hills, Antartika.

src: During the saga, Vallely was solely burdened with carrying the high-tech gear in his sled consisting of video cameras, satellite phones, hand-held computers, different kinds of solar panels, batteries and wires chargers.
ref: Dalam perjalanan itu, hanya Vallely dibebankan dengan membawa gear berteknologi tinggi di kereta luncurnya bersendirian yang terdiri daripada kamera video, telefon satelit, komputer tangan, pelbagai jenis panel solar, bateri dan wayar pengecas.

src: "Had we not brought all that stuff we probably would have got it done faster because we wouldn't have had to carry all that weight, but then it doesn't matter as much," he explained.
ref: "Sekiranya kami tidak membawa semua barang itu kita mungkin akan melakukannya dengan lebih cepat kerana kita tidak perlu membawa beban seberat itu, tetapi kemudian ia tidak begitu penting," jelasnya.

src: Vallely said he also intends to produce a documentary of the expedition.
ref: Vallely berkata dia juga bercadang untuk menghasilkan dokumentari ekspedisi.

src: Traralgon bounced back after their loss to Morwell with a 73 point victory over Sale in round thirteen of the Gippsland Football League.
ref: Traralgon bangkit semula selepas tewas kepada Morwell dengan kemenangan 73 mata menewaskan Sale di pusingan tiga belas Liga Ragbi Gippsland.

src: The Gippsland League is the only major Australian rules football competition in the Gippsland region according to the Victorian Country Football League.
ref: Liga Gippsland adalah satu-satunya pertandingan ragbi dikuasai Australia utama di kawasan Gippsland mengikut Liga Bolasepak Negara Victoria.

src: Traralgon's defence held strong as the team went inside their attacking fifty 63 times to Sales 57.
ref: Pertahanan Traralgon bertahan kuat pada masa pasukan itu masuk ke dalam serangan mereka lima puluh 63 kali berbanding Sales 57.

src: Sale, however, lead the centre clearances 35 to Traralgon's 27.
ref: Sale, bagaimanapun, mengetuai pengeluaran bola di tengah padang pada 35 berbanding Traralgon 27.

src: The victory moves Traralgon back to second, a game clear of Morwell, who lost to Maffra by 32 points.
ref: Kemenangan itu membawa Traralgon kembali ke tempat kedua, satu permainan tanpa Morwell, yang tewas kepada Maffra sebanyak 32 mata.

src: French police are holding a 31-year-old who managed to convince social workers and fellow students that he was a 15-year-old Spanish orphan and spent a whole month attending school.
ref: Polis Perancis menahan seorang berusia 31 tahun yang telah berjaya meyakinkan pekerja sosial dan rakan-rakan pelajar bahawa dia adalah seorang anak yatim Sepanyol berusia 15 tahun dan menghabiskan sepanjang bulan menghadiri sekolah.

src: Frederic Bourdin's alias was discovered when a teacher watched a television program about his exploits and his numerous identities.
ref: Alias ​​Frederic Bourdin telah ditemui apabila seorang guru menonton program televisyen mengenai eksploitasi dan pelbagai identitinya.

src: Claire Chadourne, headmistress at the College Jean-Monnet, said, "He seemed a little older than his classmates, two or three years at the most.
ref: Claire Chadourne, Guru Besar di Kolej Jean-Monnet, berkata: "Dia nampaknya sedikit lebih tua daripada rakan-rakannya, dua atau tiga tahun paling banyak.

src: Bourdin, who speaks at least five languages, told social workers and classmates that his name was Francisco Hernandez-Fernandez and that his parents had been killed in a car crash in 2000 and that he'd spent three months in a coma.
ref: Bourdin, yang boleh bercakap sekurang-kurangnya dalam lima bahasa, memberitahu pekerja sosial dan rakan-rakan sekelas yang namanya Francisco Hernandez-Fernandez dan bahawa ibu bapanya telah terbunuh dalam kemalangan jalan raya pada tahun 2000 dan bahawa dia telah berada dalam keadaan koma selama tiga bulan.

src: He claimed that after being placed into foster care, he was sexually abused and that he escaped to France.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa selepas ditempatkan di penjagaan angkat, dia telah didera secara seksual dan bahawa dia melarikan diri ke Perancis.

src: He told his teacher that he had horrible scars that he wished to hide and was given special permission to wear a cap to hide his balding.
ref: Dia memberitahu gurunya bahawa dia mempunyai parut dahsyat yang dia ingin sembunyikan dan telah diberi kebenaran khas untuk memakai topi untuk menyembunyikan kebotakannya.

src: In 1997, Bourdin was arrested and imprisoned for six years in the United States for posing a Texas couple's 14-year-old son, who disappeared three years earlier.
ref: Pada tahun 1997, Bourdin telah ditangkap dan dipenjarakan selama enam tahun di Amerika Syarikat kerana menyamar sebagai anak lelaki pasangan Texas yang berusia 14 tahun, yang hilang tiga tahun sebelum itu.

src: He managed to convince the couple that he was their son even though he had brown eyes and a heavy French accent.
ref: Dia berjaya meyakinkan pasangan itu bahawa dia adalah anak mereka walaupun dia mempunyai mata coklat dan loghat Perancis yang berat.

src: Bourdin lived with the couple for three months before a journalist exposed him and his lies were confirmed by a DNA test.
ref: Bourdin hidup dengan pasangan itu selama tiga bulan sebelum wartawan mendedahkannya dan pembohongan beliau telah disahkan dengan ujian DNA.

src: Returning from the United States in 2003, Bourdin showed up in the southeastern Alps, where he claimed to be Leo Balley, who went missing in 1996 when he was seven-years-old and camping with his father.
ref: Pulang dari Amerika Syarikat pada tahun 2003, Bourdin muncul di Alps tenggara, di mana dia mengenalkan dirinya sebagai Leo Balley, yang hilang pada tahun 1996 ketika dia berumur tujuh tahun dan berkhemah dengan bapanya.

src: He says he assumes other identities as a way of receiving the attention he never got as a child.
ref: Katanya, dia menganggap identiti lain sebagai cara untuk mendapat perhatian yang dia tidak pernah dapat semasa kecil.

src: A United Nations report has shown that sports footwear companies are making progress towards ending the use of sweatshops and are implementing more worker-friendly codes of practice than clothing companies and retailers.
ref: Laporan Bangsa-Bangsa Bersatu telah menunjukkan bahawa syarikat-syarikat kasut sukan mengambil langkah menamatkan penggunaan kilang jahit dan sedang melaksanakan kod amalan yang lebih mesra-pekerja berbanding syarikat-syarikat pakaian dan peruncit.

src: The study, published by the International Labour Organisation, suggests that consumer pressure is behind the changes.
ref: Kajian tersebut, diterbitkan oleh Pertubuhan Buruh Antarabangsa, menunjukkan bahawa tekanan dari pengguna di sebalik perubahan itu.

src: As a result of consumer's concerns, footwear companies have been diverting financial and human resources towards developing and implementing better codes of conduct for suppliers.
ref: Kesan daripada kebimbangan pengguna, syarikat-syarikat kasut telah mengalihkan sumber kewangan dan manusia ke arah membangunkan dan melaksanakan tatakelakuan untuk pembekal.

src: Large teams have been established within companies to work toward the goal of better conditions for factory workers.
ref: Pasukan besar telah ditubuhkan dalam syarikat-syarikat untuk berusaha ke arah matlamat mendapatkan keadaan yang lebih baik untuk pekerja kilang.

src: The study, based upon interviews with hundreds of managers, activists, government officials, factory workers and worker representatives and visits to companies all over the world, goes on to suggest that workers should be given more powers to oversee conditions in their places of work.
ref: Kajian itu, yang berdasarkan temu bual dengan beratus-ratus pengurus, aktivis, pegawai-pegawai kerajaan, pekerja kilang dan wakil-wakil pekerja dan lawatan ke syarikat-syarikat di seluruh dunia, menyarankan bahawa pekerja perlu diberikan lebih banyak kuasa untuk memantau keadaan di tempat kerja mereka.

src: Clothing companies have been failing to make such good progress due the large number of constantly-changing suppliers they use, with the ILO study describing progress as "spotty."
ref: Syarikat-syarikat pakaian telah gagal melakukan perkembangan sebegitu baik kerana jumlah besar pembekal yang mereka gunakan yang sentiasa berubah, dengan kajian ILO menerangkan kemajuan sebagai "turun naik."

src: A major retailer may have a supply base of over 5,000 different companies, making it more difficult to establish stronger, more effective links with supply companies.
ref: Sebuah peruncit utama mungkin mempunyai pangkalan bekalan lebih daripada 5,000 syarikat yang berbeza, menjadikannya lebih sukar untuk menubuhkan pautan yang lebih kuat, dan lebih berkesan dengan syarikat-syarikat bekalan.

src: They have also assigned less manpower to the task of compliance with codes of practice.
ref: Mereka juga telah diberikan kurang tenaga kerja manusia untuk tugas pematuhan tataamalan.

src: In some areas of the retail industry, there has been almost no compliance with codes of practice.
ref: Di sesetengah kawasan industri runcit, terdapat hampir tidak ada pematuhan tataamalan.

src: A retired Canadian military major, Michel Pilon, saw the man and two of his friends urinate on the memorial at about 11 p.m. Saturday.
ref: Seorang mejar tentera Kanada yang bersara, Michel Pilon, nampak seorang lelaki dan dua rakannya membuang air kecil pada tugu peringatan itu pada kira-kira 11 p.m. hari Sabtu.

src: The man was photographed urinating on the National War Memorial in Ottawa.
ref: Lelaki itu diambil gambar membuang air kecil di Tugu Peringatan Perang Kebangsaan di Ottawa.

src: The 23-year-old was pictured smiling and making a hand gesture toward the camera.
ref: Lelaki berusia 23 tahun itu ditangkap gambar dengan gaya senyum dan membuat isyarat tangan ke arah kamera.

src: Ottawa police are looking for the 23-year-old Montreal man and his two friends, both under the age of 18.
ref: Polis Ottawa sedang mencari lelaki dari Montreal berusia 23 tahun itu dan dua rakannya, kedua-duanya berusia di bawah umur 18 tahun.

src: "This is a shrine to people who fought for us in the wars."
ref: "Ini adalah sebuah keramat bagi orang-orang yang berjuang untuk kita semua dalam peperangan."

src: They could be charged with public urination or behaving in an offensive manner, and fined $125 or required to do a day of community work.
ref: Mereka boleh didakwa atas membuang air kecil di tempat awam atau berkelakuan tidak senonoh, dan didenda $125 atau dikehendaki membuat kerja-kerja kemasyarakatan seharian.

src: Finnish theatrical hard rock band Lordi have released Beast Loose in Paradise - which will be the soundtrack to the band's upcoming horror movie Dark Floors - as a downloadable single.
ref: Lordi kumpulan hard rock teater Finland telah mengeluarkan Beast Loose in Paradise - yang akan menjadi lagu tema kepada filem seram akan datang kumpulan tersebut Dark Floors - sebagai single yang boleh dimuat turun.

src: The song was originally intended to be released via Zed.fi, but for unknown reasons has not appeared on the site.
ref: Lagu tersebut pada asalnya bertujuan untuk dikeluarkan melalui Zed.fi, tetapi tidak dikeluarkan di laman tersebut atas sebab-sebab yang tidak diketahui.

src: However, it has appeared on at least two other sites as a pay-to-download single - MSN Music Finland and MTV3.fi.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun, ia telah dikeluarkan di sekurang-kurangnya dua laman lain sebagai single bayar untuk memuat turun- MSN Music Finland dan MTV3.fi.

src: The song was one of two recorded last month, and will be released by Sony BMG Finland as an actual CD on January 8 .
ref: Lagu tersebut merupakan salah satu daripada dua yang direkod bulan lalu, dan akan dikeluarkan oleh Sony BMG Finland sebagai CD sebenar pada 8 Januari.

src: The other song, titled Studs and Leather, was also written for the movie.
ref: Satu lagi lagu, berjudul Studs and Leather, juga ditulis bagi filem tersebut.

src: The cover art for the CD single has already been revealed.
ref: Penutup bagi CD single tersebut telahpun didedahkan.

src: It is a direct tribute to the KISS album Creatures of the Night.
ref: Ia merupakan satu penghormatan langsung kepada album KISS Creatures of the Night.

src: Most of both songs were composed during Lordi's tour of the United States as part of Ozzfest, with the band's lead vocalist saying in an interview with MonsterDiscoHell.com that the main riff of Beast Loose in Paradise was written in Milwaukee, while the chorus of Studs and Leather was composed in St. Augustine.
ref: Kedua-dua lagu kebanyakannya digubah semasa tour Lordi ke Amerika Syarikat sebagai sebahagian daripada Ozzfest, bersama vokalis utama kumpulan tersebut katanya dalam satu temubual dengan MonsterDiscoHell.com bahawa riff utama Beast Loose in Paradise ditulis di Milwaukee, sementara korus Studs and Leather digubah di St. Augustine.

src: He went on to say that Studs and Leather had originally been intended for Bend over and Pray the Lord!, an unreleased album from 1999 that had been intended to be Lordi's debut.
ref: Dia meneruskan dan berkata bahawa Studs and Leather pada asalnya ditujukan untuk Bend over and Pray the Lord! Satu album yang tidak dikeluarkan pada 1999 yang asalnya bertujuan sebagai album pertama Lordi.

src: The verses from Beast Loose in Paradise had been decided on between the whole band during therapy sessions at Christmas 2006.
ref: Rangkap dari Beast Loose in Paradise telah ditetapkan di antara sesi terapi kesuluruhan kumpulan pada Krismas 2006.

src: He said that he had written most of the rest between two US tours, the Ozzfest tour and a tour as the support act for American gothic doom metal band Type O Negative.
ref: Dia berkata bahawa dia telah menulis kebanyakannya antara dua lawatan persembahan AS, lawatan persembahan Ozzfest dan satu lagi lawatan persembahan sebagai persembahan sokongan bagi kumpulan gothic doom metal Amerika, Type O Negative.

src: He continued to deny a recent rumour posted in Finnish music periodical Soundi that the new material was going to be "more brutal and raw" than that on Lordi's last album, The Arockalypse.
ref: Dia bertambah dengan menafikan khabar angin baru-baru ini yang dipaparkan dalam muzik berkala Soundi Finland bahawa lagu baru bakal menjadi "lebih ganas dan kasar" berbanding album Lordi yang lepas, The Arockalypse.

src: "Our music is not gonna get any brutal or heavier, but not any lighter [either]..."
ref: "Muzik kami tidak akan menjadi lebih ganas mahupun lebih berat, tetapi tidak akan menjadi lebih ringan [juga]..."

src: Although Beast Loose in Paradise is more 'movie-esque' and 'horror-ish' on purpose.
ref: Walaubagaimanapun Beast Loose in Paradise dengan sengaja dicipta lebih kepada ciri "kefileman" dan "seram."

src: And some might say it's even heavier, but at the very least the chorus will be familiar and melodic Lordi stuff.
ref: Dan mungkin ada yang berkata ia lebih berat, tetapi sekurang-kurangnya korus adalah berirama seperti Lordi yang dikenali.

src: And Studs and Leather is basically Heaven's on Fire (KISS song) meets Balls To The Wall (Accept song).
ref: Dan Studds and Leather secara asasnya Heaven's on Fire (lagu KISS) bertemu Balls To The Wall (lagu Accept).

src: Internet users on the Chinese-forums.com website report that the longtime block of Wikipedia by China has been at least temporarily lifted.
ref: Pengguna internet di laman Chinese-forums.com melaporkan bahawa sekatan panjang terhadap Wikipedia oleh China sekurang-kurangnya telah ditarik sementara.

src: Absent an announcement from the Chinese government, it's unclear what the conditions were that caused the site to be accessible from within China.
ref: Ketidakhadiran pengumuman dari kerajaan China, ia masih tidak jelas keadaan yang menyebabkan laman itu boleh dilayari dari dalam China.

src: A blog by Wikipedia contributor Andrew Lih says that someone in "Beijing emailed me saying he could suddenly start using Wikipedia again.
ref: Blog dari penyumbang Wikipedia Andrew Lih berkata bahawa seseorang di "Beijing menghantar email kepadanya mengatakan dia tiba-tiba boleh mula menggunakan Wikipedia semula.

src: He continued that "from a Beijing China Netcom's residential DSL connection, the English language and other foreign language versions are now accessible, but the Chinese version is still blocked", noting that the Chinese-language version is the most important one to most Wikipedians in the country.
ref: Dia meneruskan bahawa "dari sambungan kediaman DSL Beijing China Netcom, versi bahasa Inggeris dan bahasa asing kini dapat dilayari, tetapi versi bahasa Cina masih lagi dihalang," mencatatkan bahawa Wikipedia versi bahasa-Cina ialah yang paling penting di negara ini.

src: The blog entry goes on to explain the finer points of China's blocking system, which is more complex than most media outlets suggest.
ref: Entri blog diteruskan untuk menjelaskan perkara yang lebih halus terhadap sistem halangan yang dikenakan China, yang mana lebih kompleks berbanding kebanyakan cadangan pasaran media lain.

src: Wikimedia head Jimmy Wales told Moneycontrol.com yesterday that, "We don't know what they took offense to."
ref: Peneraju Wikimedia Jimmy Wales memberitahu Moneycontrol.com semalam bahawa, "Kami tidak tahu apa yang mereka cuba sembunyikan."

src: "We really don't intend to compromise the way Google did."
ref: "Kami betul-betul tidak mahu untuk berkrompomi dengan cara yang dilakukan Google."

src: "I am trying to set up high-level meetings in China to state our case and explain why we should be unblocked."
ref: "Saya cuba utuk menubuhkan mesyuarat di peringkat tinggi China untuk menjelaskan kes dan menerangkan mengapa kami tidak patut dihalang."

src: "We have no idea what the result of that would be."
ref: "Kami tidak mempunyai idea mengenai apa keputusan yang akan keluar."

src: "Wikipedia is not a haven for dissidents but an encyclopedia."
ref: "Wikipedia bukanlah syurga bagi penentang-penentang tetapi ensiklopedia."

src: "About 99.9 percent of Wikipedia has topics that are not of interest to the Chinese Government."
ref: "Lebih kurang 99.9 peratus daripada Wikipedia merupakan topik-topik yang tidak diminati oleh Kerajaan China."

src: He also told the outlet, he stressed how such bans were blocking Chinese perspectives in the global media.
ref: Beliau juga berkata kepada outlet, beliau menekankan bagaimana halangan sebegitu menghalang persepektif China dalam media global.

src: The third block of Wikipedia, which was implemented 19 October 2005, was issued without explanation or an expected length.
ref: Halangan ketiga Wikipedia, yang diimplimentasi pada 19 Oktober 2005, telah pun diisukan tanpa penjelasan atau tempoh jangkaan masa.

src: Wikipedia has been blocked twice before, the first from 2-21 June 2004, due to the 15th anniversary of the Tian'anmen Square Incident.
ref: Wikipedia telah dihalang dua kali sebelum ini, pertamanya dari 2-21 Jun 2004, akibat ulang tahun ke-15 Kejadian Tian'anmen Square.

src: A website called baidu.com runs a self-censored wiki-based encyclopedia website, called baidubaike.com, launched in April of this year.
ref: Laman web yang dipanggil baidu.com menjalankan tapisan diri berdasarkan laman web ensiklopedia, dipanggil baidubaike.com, yang dilancarkan pada April tahun ini.

src: Wikipedia is a project of the Wikimedia Foundation, a non-profit organisation based out of St. Petersberg, Florida.
ref: Wikipedia merupakan projekWikimedia Foundation, organisasi tanpa keuntungan berasaskan kepada St. Petersberg, Florida.

src: Its 2007 annual convention, Wikimania, is set to take place in Taipei.
ref: Ia merupakan kenvensyen tahunan 2007, Wikimania, yang dirancang untuk mengambil tempat di Taipei.

src: According to the head of Kenyan seafarer's program, Somali pirates have hijacked another vessel from the United States.
ref: Menurut ketua program pelaut Kenya, lanun Somalia telah merampas sebuah lagi kapal dari Amerika Syarikat.

src: An American-owned tugboat from Italy along with its 16 member crew was hijacked around 11 am EST on Saturday in the Gulf of Aden.
ref: Satu kapal tunda milik Amerika dari Itali bersama-sama dengan 16 anggota anak-anak kapal dirampas sekitar 11 pagi EST pada hari Sabtu di Teluk Aden.

src: The Italian Ambassador, Pierandrea Magistrati, confirmed that "there is a boat that has been hijacked, I believe by Somali pirates."
ref: Duta Besar Itali, Pierandrea Magistrati, mengesahkan bahawa "terdapat satu bot yang telah dirampas, saya percaya oleh lanun Somalia."

src: Additionally, Shona Lowe, a spokeswoman at NATO's Northwood maritime command center reported that the Italian-flagged tugboat was hijacked this morning off of Somalia's northern coast.
ref: Tambahan pula, Shona Lowe, seorang jurucakap di Northwood pusat kawalan maritim NATO melaporkan bahawa kapal tunda yang berbendera Itali dirampas pagi ini di luar pantai utara Somalia.

src: Lowe also confirmed that Italian government officials along with the company that owned the tugboat were trying to secure the release of the crew, ten of which were Italians.
ref: Lowe juga mengesahkan bahawa pegawai-pegawai kerajaan Itali bersama-sama dengan syarikat yang dimiliki kapal tunda itu telah cuba untuk membebaskan anak-anak kapal, sepuluh daripadanya adalah orang Itali.

src: Andrew Mwangura, the head of the East African Seafarers' Assistance Program, said that maritime industry sources also reported that the U.S. tugboat was towing two barges at the time it was attacked.
ref: Andrew Mwangura, ketua Program Bantuan Pelaut Afrika Timur, berkata bahawa sumber-sumber industri maritim juga melaporkan bahawa kapal tunda A.S. telah menunda dua tongkang pada masa ia diserang.

src: The contents of those barges is not known at this time.
ref: Kandungan tongkang-tongkang itu tidak diketahui pada masa ini.

src: Meanwhile, U.S. Captain Richard Phillips of the U.S. Maersk Alabama is still being held hostage, for a fourth day, by four other Somali pirates.
ref: Sementara itu, Kapten Amerika Syarikat Richard Phillips dari Maersk Alabama A.S. masih ditahan, untuk hari keempat, oleh empat lanun Somalia lain.

src: Phillips, who voluntarily surrendered himself to the pirates in order to protect his crew, is being held in a lifeboat despite an attempt to escape.
ref: Phillips, yang secara sukarela menyerah diri kepada lanun untuk melindungi anak-anak kapal, ditahan dalam bot penyelamat walaupun mencuba melarikan diri sekali.

src: The fourth day of New York Fashion Week debuted few daring designs even from designers known for such work.
ref: Hari keempat Minggu Fesyen New York mempergayakan beberapa reka bentuk yang menjolok mata buat kali pertamanya meskipun daripada pereka yang terkenal dengan gaya itu.

src: With few exceptions, the overwhelming theme was "old is new" and that the '70s were even more in fashion than the shows on Sunday suggested.
ref: Dengan beberapa pengecualian, tema yang amat menarik itu adalah "lama adalah baru" dan 70-an makin dalam fesyen berbanding pertunjukan pada hari Ahad yang dicadangkan.

src: Among the designers to unveil their Fall 2008 lines on Monday were Oscar de la Renta, Carolina Herrera, Betsey Johnson, Proenza Schouler and a rejuvenated Halston line, under the direction of designer Marco Zanini.
ref: Antara pereka untuk mempamerkan koleksi Musim Luruh 2008 mereka pada hari Isnin adalah Oscar de la Renta, Carolina Herrera, Betsey Johnson, Proenza Schouler dan koleksi Halston yang diberikan nafas baru, di bawah arahan pereka Marco Zanini.

src: Both global warming and the slowing economy have been cited as reasons for the overwhelming use of lighter fabrics over heavier attire.
ref: Kedua-dua pemanasan global dan ekonomi yang semakin lembap telah dinamakan sebagai alasan untuk kegunaan fabrik ringan yang amat lebih berbanding dengan fabrik yang lebih berat.

src: Also, retro designs and continuing trends have been used in effort to save money, like the tights that were expected to go out of fashion this year.
ref: Juga, reka bentuk retro dan perkembangan berterusan telah digunakan dalam usaha untuk menjimat wang, seperti pakaian ketat yang dijangka keluar dari fesyen tahun ini.

src: Even in the glamorous world of high-end fashion, money has been tight, and with the world economies in a collective downturn, major designers have been more wary of continuing to churn out the stream of couture designs that past Fashion Weeks have seen.
ref: Walaupun dalam dunia glamor fesyen mewah, wang berkurangan, dan dengan ekonomi dunia dalam kemerosotan kolektif, pereka utama lebih berhati-hati untuk terus melahirkan aliran reka bentuk anggun yang diperlihatkan dalam Minggu Fesyen lepas.

src: The lone daring designer for the day was Carolina Herrera, who discarded the furs she promoted in the Fall 2007 show to focus on a Peter Pan theme, with earth tones and bird feathers.
ref: Pereka perseorangan pakaian menjolok mata untuk hari itu merupakan Carolina Herrera, yang membuang bulu yang dia promosikan dalam pertunjukan Musim Luruh 2007 untuk memberi tumpuan kepada tema Peter Pan, dengan warna-warna tanah dan bulu burung.

src: To further the "flying Peter Pan" motif, models donned such designs as a chiffon dress with ostrich feathers and a taffeta gown with a feather waistband.
ref: Untuk melanjutkan motif "terbang Peter Pan," model memakai reka bentuk seperti pakaian chiffon dengan bulu burung unta dan gaun kain taf dengan pinggang bulu.

src: Oscar de la Renta opted for more traditional blacks, golds and grays, debuting lines for men and women in fabrics he is familiar with.
ref: Oscar de la Renta memilih untuk warna tradisional, hitam, emas dan kelabu, memperkenalkan koleksi untuk lelaki dan wanita dalam kain dia kenali buat kali pertamanya.

src: Men were outfitted in tweed while women were fitted in dresses that experimented with embroidery and tulle, both shades of past collections.
ref: Lelaki telah dipakaikan tweed manakala wanita telah dipakaikan pakaian yang bereksperimen dengan sulaman dan tulle, kedua-dua warna koleksi musim lalu.

src: Among others, labels Badgley Mischka, Diesel, and Vivienne Tam unveil their newest collections on Tuesday.
ref: Antara lain, label Badgley Mischka, Diesel, dan Vivienne Tam memperkenalkan koleksi terbaru mereka pada hari Selasa.

src: There are at least two big winners in Tuesday night's US$370 million Mega Millions lottery drawing which is held in 12 U.S. states.
ref: Terdapat sekurang-kurangnya dua pemenang besar untuk cabutan loteri Mega Million Malam Selasa $370 Juta yang diadakan di 12 negeri Amerika Syarikat.

src: The two winning tickets were sold in Georgia and New Jersey, but lottery officials say that no one has come forward to claim their millions.
ref: Kedua-dua tiket yang menang telah dijual di Georgia dan New Jersey, tetapi pegawai-pegawai loteri mengatakan bahawa tiada siapa yang telah tampil ke hadapan untuk menuntut hadiah berjuta-juta mereka.

src: One ticket was sold at a store called Campark Liquors, which is located in Woodbine, New Jersey.
ref: Satu tiket telah dijual di kedai yang dipanggil Campark Liquors, yang terletak di Woodbine, New Jersey.

src: The other ticket was sold at what is called the Favorite Market, located in Dalton, Georgia.
ref: Tiket yang lain telah dijual di apa yang dikenali sebagai Pasaran kegemaran, bertempat di Dalton, Georgia.

src: The drawing, the biggest in Mega Millions history, was moved from its usual location in Atlanta, Georgia to Times Square, New York because at one point, according to New York's lottery commissioner, Robert McLaughlin, at least 1,000,000 tickets an hour were being sold in the state of New York.
ref: Cabutan, yang terbesar dalam sejarah Mega Millions, telah dipindahkan dari lokasi biasa di Atlanta, Georgia ke Times Square, New York kerana pada satu ketika, menurut Pesuruhjaya loteri New York, Robert McLaughlin, sekurang-kurangnya 1,000,000 tiket telah dijual dalam satu jam di negeri New York.

src: In fact, the state's lottery system, for reasons still not known, went off-line at 10:25 p.m., just over a half hour before the drawing was to be held.
ref: Malah, sistem loteri di negeri ini, atas sebab-sebab masih tidak diketahui, putus talian pada 10:25 p.m., hanya lebih setengah jam sebelum cabutan itu akan dimulakan.

src: At least one person was one number away from winning the jackpot, matching five of the six numbers.
ref: Sekurang-kurangnya satu orang kurang satu nombor dari memenangi jackpot, di mana lima daripada enam nombor sepadan.

src: That ticket is worth $250,000 and was bought at Burtonsville Crown Beer & Wine in Montgomery County, Maryland.
ref: Tiket tersebut bernilai $ 250,000 dan telah dibeli di Burtonsville Crown Beer & Wine di Montgomery County, Maryland.

src: The previous record for the highest multi-state lottery was set back in 2006 when the Power Ball jackpot paid out at least $365 million dollars to eight people in Nebraska.
ref: Rekod sebelum ini untuk loteri pelbagai negeri di rekodkan pada tahun 2006 apabila jackpot Power Ball membayar sekurang-kurangnya $365 juta dolar untuk lapan orang di Nebraska.

src: Another multi-state lottery, The Big Game (which was later named Mega Millions) has the third highest jackpot of $363 million dollars which was paid out in 2000.
ref: Satu lagi loteri pelbagai negeri, Big Game (yang kemudiannya dinamakan Mega Million) mempunyai jackpot tertinggi ketiga $363 juta dolar yang dibayar pada tahun 2000.

src: The government of Saudi Arabia removed an eleven-year ban on livestock imports from Somalia after fears of Rift Valley Fever were allayed, senior Somali officials said on Thursday.
ref: Kerajaan Arab Saudi telah mengeluarkan sebelas-tahun sekatan terhadap haiwan ternakan import dari Somalia selepas taku jangkitan dari Demam Rift Valley tersebar, kata pegawai atasan Somali pada Khamis.

src: The decision was well received across Somalia, as hundreds of thousands of farmers heavily rely on animal exports to the oil-rich Middle East.
ref: Keputusan itu diterima Somalia, selepas beratus ribu peladang sangat bergantung kepada pengeksoprtan haiwan ke negara kaya dengan minyak Timur tengah.

src: Under the new arrangement, Saudi officials will closely examine animals before they are shipped off to Saudi soil.
ref: Tertakluk dibawah susunan baru, pejabat Saudi akan mengkaji lebih dekat haiwan itu sebelum dihantar keluar ke tanah Saudi.

src: "This is a tremendous decision for Somalis across the Horn of Africa," said Idiris Ibrahim Abdi, the livestock minister of Somaliland, the self-declared republic in northern Somalia, which has developed one of the most sophisticated animal processing plants in its port town of Berbera.
ref: "Ini adalah keputusan drastik untuk Somalia merentas Tanah Afrika," kata Idiris Ibrahim Abdi, Menteri ternakan tanah Somalia, republik diutara Somalia yang mengisytuhar sendiri, yang telah membangun sebagai pusat pemprosesan haiwan yang canggih di bandar pelabuhan Berbera.

src: According to news accounts, the Saudi agricultural ministry said the decision is based on years of cross-examination and monitoring of animal farms in Somalia.
ref: Menurut akaun berita, kementerian pertanian Saudi berkata keputusan itu dibuat berdasarkan kajian bertahun dan pemerhatian kepada ladang-ladang di Somalia.

src: Animal trade is one of the few surviving economic engines of Somalia's largely destroyed economy.
ref: Dagangan haiwan merupakan salah satu dari enjin kehidupan ekonomi Somalia yang musnah.

src: Business leaders and animal farmers have largely welcomed the Saudi decision.
ref: Ketua perusahaan dan penternak haiwan secara berbesar hati mengalu-alukan keputusan Saudi.

src: The Ulster Defense Association (UDA), a paramilitary group in Northern Ireland that wants Northern Ireland to remain in the United Kingdom, said today that it has rid itself of its weapons.
ref: Kesatuan Pertahanan Ulster (UDA), sebuah kumpulan separa tentera di Ireland Utara yang mahu Ireland Utara kekal di United Kingdom, berkata hari ini bahawa ia telah menghapuskan senjatanya.

src: A statement by the group read, "The Ulster Defense Association was formed to defend our communities."
ref: Satu kenyataan oleh kumpulan tersebut berkata, "Kesatuan Pertahanan Ulster telah ditubuhkan untuk mempertahankan masyarakat kita."

src: "We state quite clearly and categorically that this responsibility now rests with the government and its institutions where legitimacy resides."
ref: "Kami menyatakan dengan jelas dan mutlak bahawa tanggungjawab ini kini terletak di tangan kerajaan dan institusi di mana kesahihan berada."

src: UDA spokesperson Frankie Gallagher spoke at a press conference in Belfast, stating that the group regrets the approximately 400 people, primarily Catholic civilians, that they were responsible for the murder of between 1971 and 2001.
ref: Jurucakap UDA Frankie Gallagher bercakap di sidang akhbar di Belfast, menyatakan bahawa kumpulan itu kesal dengan kira-kira 400 orang, terutamanya orang awam Katolik, bahawa mereka yang bertanggungjawab ke atas pembunuhan antara tahun 1971 dan 2001.

src: He added, "But we are determined and are willing to play our full part in ensuring that tragedy of the last 40 years will never happen again."
ref: Beliau menambah, "Tetapi kami berazam dan bersedia untuk memainkan peranan penuh kami dalam memastikan tragedi 40 tahun lalu tidak akan berlaku lagi."

src: The destruction of ammunition and explosives was verified by the Independent International Commission on Decommissioning, stating that other groups have a deadline of February 9 to destroy arms they may still hold, after which they may potentially face imprisonment.
ref: Pemusnahan peluru dan bahan letupan telah disahkan oleh Suruhanjaya Antarabangsa Bebas dalam Penyahtauliahan, yang menyatakan bahawa kumpulan-kumpulan lain mempunyai tarikh akhir 9 Februari untuk memusnahkan senjata yang mereka masih miliki, dan selepas itu mereka mungkin menghadapi hukuman penjara.

src: Ireland's Foreign Affairs Minister, Micheál Martin, said in a statement, "This is a statement of confidence in the political process and in the devolved institutions."
ref: Menteri Luar Ireland, Micheal Martin, katanya dalam satu kenyataan, "Ini adalah satu kenyataan keyakinan dalam proses politik dan di institusi diturunkan."

src: Irish President Mary McAleese said the group's choice was "a very positive milestone on the journey of peace."
ref: Presiden Ireland Mary McAleese berkata pilihan kumpulan itu adalah "satu peristiwa yang sangat positif atas perjalanan mencapai kedamaian."

src: The other main "loyalist" groups, the Ulster Volunteer Force (UVF) and Red Hand Commandos (RHC), are reported to have destroyed their arms last June, with the Irish Republican Army (IRA) having destroyed their arms four years ago.
ref: Kumpulan "setia" utama yang lain, Pasukan Sukarelawan Ulster (UVF) dan Komando Tangan Merah (RHC), dilaporkan telah memusnahkan senjata mereka pada bulan Jun lepas, dengan Republik Ireland Army (IRA) telah memusnahkan senjata mereka empat tahun lalu.

src: However, two republican splinter groups, the Continuity Irish Republican Army (CIRA) and the Real Irish Republican Army (RIRA), have refused to lay down their arms and have continued to undertake attacks including three murders in March of 2009.
ref: Walau bagaimanapun, kedua-dua kumpulan serpihan republik, Kesinambungan Irish Republican Army (CIRA) dan Real Irish Republican Army (RIRA), telah menolak untuk meletakkan senjata mereka dan terus menjalankan serangan termasuk tiga pembunuhan pada bulan Mac 2009.

src: The Real IRA attacked the Massereene Barracks in Antrim, County Antrim on March 7 and killed two British soliders.
